name: /space-export converts absolute file paths in metric records to repo-relative paths to avoid leaking home directory layout
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/space repo && cd repo && printf '{"id":"m1","file":"%s/repo/src/x.js"}\n' "$PWD/.." > ../.claude-tdd-pro/space/collected.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-export.sh" --collected ../.claude-tdd-pro/space/collected.jsonl --out ../export.json --root "$PWD" 2>err.txt && cd .. && ! grep -q "$PWD" export.json && grep -q '"file":"src/x.js"' export.json && echo ok 1>&2
